_README: Express-lane region per camera, in PIXEL coordinates of the 1920x1080 frame. A vehicle is 'Express' if its wheels-on-road point (bottom-center of its detection box) falls inside express_polygon; otherwise 'General Purpose'. The Carrier Pkwy polygon below is an INITIAL ESTIMATE read from a sample frame (the central barrier-separated corridor between the two solid center lines). Verify/tune it with calibrate_lanes.py, then set calibrated=true. Points are [x, y] in order bottom-left, bottom-right, top-right, top-left; the trapezoid is wide at the frame bottom and narrows toward the underpass.
